requirements.title: Stability counter increments on stable input
requirements.statement: An internal stability counter shall increment by 1 on every rising clk edge where btn_in equals the last sampled value, when rst_n is deasserted.

requirements.title: Counter resets on input change
requirements.statement: The stability counter shall reset to 0 on any rising clk edge where btn_in differs from the last sampled value.

requirements.title: db_out updates after THRESH stable cycles
requirements.statement: db_out shall update to match btn_in when the stability counter reaches THRESH consecutive stable cycles.

requirements.title: Reset clears all state
requirements.statement: On active-low reset (rst_n=0), the stability counter, last-sample register, and db_out shall clear to 0.
